name: rvdbreemen-adr-kit
description: Marketplace hosting the adr-kit plugin: a drop-in Architecture Decision Record toolkit for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: adr-kit
plugins.description: Drop-in ADR toolkit with three modes: /adr-kit:init (one-shot bootstrap + audit + hook), pre-commit verification via bin/adr-judge against declarative Enforcement blocks, and on-demand /adr-kit:adr / /adr-kit:judge for authoring and in-session review.
